title: Ubiquiti ENVR - UniFi Enterprise Network Video Recorder
category: Cameras, security / IP NVR Recorders / UniFi Video
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise Network Video Recorder is a device from the Enterprise series designed for business environments This powerful recorder for UniFi Protect cameras, with a height of 3U and 16 bays for 2.5 / 3" hard drives with RAID1 suppor, is capable of supporting up to 70 cameras at 4K (8MP) resolution, up to 140 cameras at 2K (4MP) resolution , or up to 210 cameras at FullHD (2MP) resolution . It is equipped with dual hot-swap power supplies, each rated at 550W . Up to 310W of power is allocated for hard drives. Network communication is provided via 1x 10G Ethernet and 2x 10G SFP+ ports Device Rails for 19" rack Mounting kit for rails (2) 230V power cables (4) Cable management accessories
specsSearch: Image Max. recording resolution 8MP Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10GE + (2) SFP+ Power Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 410 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 3 Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Weight [g] 19500 Width [mm] 482 Height [mm] 132 Depth [mm] 480 Hardware Number of supported IP cameras 210 Number of supported HDD 16 General Camera class UniFi Protect Software Raid level 1 - mirroring
